# =============================================================================
# Automaton Auditor - Locked Dependencies
# =============================================================================
# This file pins all dependencies to specific versions for reproducibility.
# DO NOT edit manually - regenerate with: pip freeze > requirements-lock.txt
# Install with: pip install -r requirements-lock.txt
# =============================================================================

# Core LangGraph and LangChain
langgraph==0.2.48
langgraph-checkpoint==2.0.3
langchain-core==0.3.24
langchain-openai==0.2.10
langchain-anthropic==0.2.5

# Pydantic and validation
pydantic==2.10.3
pydantic-settings==2.7.1

# Environment and configuration
python-dotenv==1.0.1

# Git operations
GitPython==3.1.43

# AST parsing
astor==0.8.1

# PDF handling
PyPDF2==3.0.1
pypdf==5.1.0
pdf2image==1.17.0

# Image processing
Pillow==11.1.0

# File type detection
python-magic==0.4.27

# Tokenization
tiktoken==0.8.0

# Retry logic
tenacity==9.0.0

# Rich terminal output
rich==13.9.4

# Type checking support
typing-extensions==4.12.2

# Async support
typing-inspection==0.2.0

# Debugging
stack-data==0.6.3
executing==2.1.0

# JSON handling
orjson==3.10.12

# HTTP client (for API calls)
httpx==0.28.1
httpx-sse==0.4.0

# Local LLM support
langchain-ollama==0.1.1

# Certificate handling (for secure connections)
certifi==2024.12.14

# Date/time handling
python-dateutil==2.9.0

# Path handling
pathspec==0.12.1

# Windows compatibility (for file operations)
pywin32==308; sys_platform == "win32"

# Packaging
setuptools==75.8.0
wheel==0.45.1
